prompt: Create a full-body anime-style character illustration on a plain white background, showing a tall, slim young Black man with dark brown skin standing in a relaxed streetwear pose, head slightly tilted, shoulders loose, and both hands tucked into his pants pockets. His face is intentionally obscured by a centered square blur/censor block with a soft brown-to-white gradient, while short high-top black hair and one visible ear remain partly visible. He wears an oversized warm brown crewneck sweatshirt with loose sleeves and wrinkled fabric, layered over a slightly visible off-white undershirt at the hem. Around his neck are two thin gold chains, one with a small Africa-shaped pendant. He wears baggy deep purple track pants with a single bold white side stripe on each leg, gathered at the ankles, plus cream and purple high-top sneakers with dark laces and chunky soles. Use clean manga/anime line art, muted colors, subtle cel shading, expressive clothing folds, long proportions, and a fashion character design feel, with the figure centered vertically and no props or background details.
